'''Grodon Lakky''' was a brutal, sadistic man who was placed in command of the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] pool at the [[Maw Installation]]. He derived great pleasure from breaking his slaves. However, he received no respect from his superiors.<ref name="The Jedi Academy Sourcebook">''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Biography==
[[File:Grodon_Lakky.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Lakky beats Wookiee slaves at the Maw Installation.]]
Lakky was killed at the Maw Installation by [[Nawruun]], who rose up against his master when [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] freed the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] slaves during the [[Battle of the Maw]] Installation.<ref name="Champions of the Force">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref>
